summary: All 6 changes implementable with no external blockers. Key gaps: (1) epoch interruption = 3 targeted edits, no new deps; (2) AllowAllPolicySource needs DbKilnPolicySource + migration 0009; (3) BGW caller=None bypasses Cedar = trivial fix (~10 lines); sigstore 0.14 API needs audit before G4; fke-sign-did needs reqwest + HTTP fallback for G5. Optimal order: G1+G3 immediately (trivial) → G2 (migration + port) → G2 makes G3 meaningful → G4/G5/G6 in parallel.
